1st.notes: Drive 1st: Forward clutch applied, rear carrier held by sprag.

2nd.notes: Drive 2nd: Forward clutch applied, sun held by intermediate band.

3rd.notes: Drive 3rd: Forward clutch and High/Reverse clutch applied for direct drive.

Rev.notes: Reverse: High/Reverse clutch drives sun, Low/Reverse band holds rear carrier.

Manual1.notes: Manual 1: Forward clutch applied, rear carrier held by Low/Reverse band.

Manual2.notes: Manual 2: Forward clutch applied, sun held by intermediate band.

notes: Shift schedule for Ford C4-style 3-speed Simpson automatic transmission.
